On Endicott Creek Road (the name is certain, but the location on this map might be a bit off), just off HIghway 42, is an abandoned barn. Surrounding it are many hazelnuts (perhaps a dozen, maybe more), as well as a few apple trees, and loads of blackberry bus

On Endicott Creek Road (the name is certain, but the location on this map might be a bit off), just off HIghway 42, is an abandoned barn. Surrounding it are many hazelnuts (perhaps a dozen, maybe more), as well as a few apple trees, and loads of blackberry bus

For the vinophile in your group of friends, here are two plum trees with a grape vine growing up one of them. The road is Endicott Creek Road; this map does not give it a label, but our sources tell us this is where its at. Our sources clearly were not English
